memoryArtifacts.description:
Page 627. Vol III. 1882
The History of the County Palatine and City of Chester; Compiled from Original Evidences in Public Offices, The Harleian and Cottonian MSS. , Parochial Registers, Private Muniments, Unpublished MS. Collections of Successive Cheshire Antiquaries, and A personal survey of every township in the county ; Incorporated with a republication of King's Vale Royal, And Leycester's Cheshire Antiquities.
By George Ormerod, Esq. , LL.D. F.R.S. & F.S.A.  
In 3 Volumes, Volume III,
First Edition, 1819 - 472 pages
Second Edition, 1882 
Revised and Enlarged 1882 - 879 Pages
By Thomas Helsby, Esq. , of Lincoln's Inn, Barrister-at-Law.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Randall Mainwaring III於1440年出生在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福時，他的父親Randall Mainwaring26歲，母親Elizabeth Savage26歲。他於1453年與Margaret Davenport在英國爾普雷斯特波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1488年在英國英格蘭爾可米哈姆享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Randall Mainwaring III于1440年出生在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福时，他的父亲Randall Mainwaring26岁，母亲Elizabeth Savage26岁。他于1453年与Margaret Davenport在英国爾普雷斯特波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1488年在英国英格兰爾可米哈姆享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Randall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randell
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randal
meanings: Gaelicized borrowing of Old Norse Rögnvaldr, a compound of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’.

variants.name: Randle
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randel
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

en.lifeSummary: When Randall Mainwaring III was born in 1440, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Randall Mainwaring, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Savage, was 26. He married Margaret Davenport in 1453, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1488, in Kermincham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Randall Mainwaring III est né en 1440, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Randall Mainwaring, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Savage, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Davenport en 1453, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1488, à Kermincham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Randall Mainwaring III(이)가 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 프오버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Randall Mainwaring(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Savage(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1453년 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에서 Margaret Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 커민챔에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Randall Mainwaring III родился в 1440 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Randall Mainwaring было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Savage, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Davenport в 1453 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1488 г. в местности кирминчам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
